nasb.text: Now Hiram king of Tyre sent messengers to David with cedar trees, masons and carpenters, to build a house for him.

esv.text: And Hiram king of Tyre sent messengers to David, and cedar trees, also masons and carpenters to build a house for him.

cnv.text: 推羅王希蘭派使者來見大衛，給他送上香柏木、石匠和木匠，要為他建造宮殿。

ccb.text: 泰尔王希兰差遣使者带着香柏木、木匠和石匠去为大卫建造宫殿。
